//: Template hooks config for the claud-it plugin. Merge or copy into ~/.claude/settings.json or the project's .claude/settings.json.
//how: The Phase 6 install.sh will substitute <CLAUD_IT_ROOT> with the absolute path on each machine. Until then, replace <CLAUD_IT_ROOT> manually with where you cloned claud-it (e.g., /Users/you/code/claud-it).
//bypass: All hooks honor CLAUD_IT_BYPASS=1 as an emergency escape (e.g., recovery from a corrupted .claude/scope).
